ordinary|**result** fixed phase 4 defects plus deeper failures: - calibration now requires valid source metadata. - fresh run provenance and immutable base-model lineage saved. - pipeline propagates run id, sha, profile, receipt directory. - model/sidecar writes rollback together on failure. - dashboard rejects missing/invalid metadata; no feature guessing. - fixed `models/models/advanced` path bug. - sensitivity tab handles failed predictions and clears stale results. - updated obsolete `predictionresult` tests. verification: **38 passed**, compile passed, scoped diff clean. **harsh verdict** project not thesis-ready yet. main blockers: 1. chronological split ignores outcome-label availability. year-boundary future-label leakage possible. 2. catboost calibration may use 2023 records also used for selection. 3. matched-only 2025 test cohort likely right-truncated. 4. all 178 scanned model json files fail current metadata schema. regeneration required. 5. phase 2 and phase 5 lack independent deep audits. 6. closeout documents use conflicting task numbering and stale test counts. 7. current dirty concurrent tree makes phase 6 canonical regeneration invalid. also found four unrelated model-test failures around strict chronological fixtures, missing metadata columns, and changed function signatures. did not edit active agent areas. **run after agents finish** ```powershell python -m pytest -q python -m pytest tests/test_split.py tests/test_calibration_chronology.py -q python -m pytest tests/test_leakage_audit.py tests/test_feature_sets.py -q python -m pytest tests/test_pipeline_runner.py tests/test_provenance.py tests/test_artifact_manifest.py -q ``` do not run final regeneration yet. first freeze/commit stable source, resolve chronology and calibration-selection overlap, then run manual regeneration from `docs/closeout/manual-regeneration-runbook.md`.
